product.description: Consumer endpoint security suite. Multi-process architecture: SYSTEM-context service host (bdservicehost.exe) loading multiple service DLLs (bdappsrv, bdappservice, etc.); kernel drivers (bdprivmon, bddci4, trufos) for self-protection and AV operations; Admin / user-context UI processes (bdagent, seccenter, bduserhost). IPC backbone is msgbus (named pipe `local\msgbus\bdappsrv`) with application-layer auth rules (same_sign, trusted_client_process, trusted_client_path, trusted_parent_process, admin_client, admin_write_client_folder).

binaries_comprehended.summary: SYSTEM-context Bitdefender service host that receives control commands, verifies signed callers, and dispatches service installs, process starts, and DLL loads.

accepted_inputs: SCM service control codes dispatched through service__on_control_handler
Files presented to verify_authenticode_signature / verify_file_trust / verify_file_via_catalog
DLLs resolved by name through LoadLibraryByName / vb_load_bdch_dll_resolve_exports
Path-shaped strings flowing through sanitize_path_env_var / set_env_var_nolock_helper
dangerous_operations_reachable: set_service_launch_type / start_service / vb_start_service_dispatcher (start services as SYSTEM)
LoadLibraryByName / load_library_or_throw / vb_load_bdch_dll_resolve_exports (load DLLs into SYSTEM process)
